scripts.deploy:require-approved: test "${DEPLOY_APPROVED:-}" = "1" || (echo "Set DEPLOY_APPROVED=1 to allow deploy" && exit 1)
scripts.deploy:require-config: test -f "${WRANGLER_DEPLOY_CONFIG:-wrangler.local.jsonc}" || (echo "Wrangler deploy config not found: ${WRANGLER_DEPLOY_CONFIG:-wrangler.local.jsonc}" && exit 1)
scripts.deploy: pnpm deploy:require-approved && pnpm deploy:require-config && wrangler deploy --minify --config "${WRANGLER_DEPLOY_CONFIG:-wrangler.local.jsonc}"
scripts.d1:migrations:list:remote: pnpm d1:require-config && wrangler d1 migrations list DB --remote --config "${WRANGLER_D1_CONFIG:-wrangler.local.jsonc}"
scripts.d1:time-travel:info: pnpm d1:require-config && wrangler d1 time-travel info DB --config "${WRANGLER_D1_CONFIG:-wrangler.local.jsonc}"
scripts.d1:migrations:apply:local: pnpm d1:require-config && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --config "${WRANGLER_D1_CONFIG:-wrangler.local.jsonc}"
scripts.d1:migrations:apply:remote: pnpm d1:require-config && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config "${WRANGLER_D1_CONFIG:-wrangler.local.jsonc}"
